evals.prompt: My product list with 500 items is laggy when scrolling. I'm using a Column with children mapped to ProductCard widgets.
evals.expected_output: Replace Column with ListView.builder for item recycling, ensure ProductCard is const where possible, add ValueKey per item

evals.prompt: Every time the cart item count updates in the header, the entire screen rebuilds including expensive product grid.
evals.expected_output: Use BlocBuilder<CartBloc, CartState>(buildWhen: ...) or context.select() to limit rebuild scope, or RepaintBoundary around stable sections

evals.prompt: The app is using a lot of memory when loading the product catalog which has many high-res images.
evals.expected_output: Use CachedNetworkImage with memCacheWidth set to display size, not original resolution; dispose image caches; paginate to 20 items

should_not_trigger: How do I add a loading animation?
Write a performance test for the BLoC
Add pagination to the API call in the repository
